com.delphix.masking.api.plugin.config

Class Property

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.delphix.masking.api.plugin.config.Property

  • public final class Property
extends java.lang.Object
    This class defines a single property for the GroupedProperties configuration mechanism. Construction uses static methods rather than the builder paradigm, since each type of property requires a relatively small number of values to define.
